content:
## External Content Following

When external links are mentioned in conversations, the triage agent should follow them and consider them for relevancy. Blog posts and other linked content can be directly relevant to the project's intent and should not be discarded just because they are external. [[source:811302f6-0be7-435c-b844-910cc9a21b67/31]]

provenance.raw_agent: The URL-fetching instruction means the blog posts in seq 6 should no longer be discarded — the agent will curl them, read them, and use them as context for understanding the decisions that follow.
provenance.raw_user: ok. Let's maybe change the agent prompt to write to a brand new wiki. Maybe delete what's already there. Possibly also make a note that when external links are mentioned, they should be followed and considered for relevancy. The blog posts we mentioned at the top of this conversation were pretty relevant to the plan
